# programs.tcpdump

All options under `programs.tcpdump`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.tcpdump.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to configure a setcap wrapper for tcpdump. To use it, add your user to the `pcap` group. |
